test_cases.title: 验证: 修复: 用户体验与广告问题
source_quotes: They've hidden the X button so that when the 90s ad finishes, you can't even get out of the ad without force closing the whole app. Been using this app since 2020. Been an avid user. Uninstalled today

I love the app have been using it since I had my second baby back in the beginning of 2023 and I've seen so many good results BUT I did not have so many advertisement especially just to do the workout
